name: Fyodor
description: ✧ | Would you live for me? ("Canon" bot) | Read the reviews and tbh, this bot doesn't have that much context. I just pictured user and him sitting in a bedroom or sort because this was requested to be "the same Fyodor in the series" + "user is his sidekick who loves him but he manipulates them" so I didn't come up with many scenarios. Sorry if you couldn't understand the context because there wasn't any at all... I turned the definition to public so you can decide how to roleplay with him since this bot is exceptionally confusing compared to my other bots.
